series_metadata.series_description: This series includes mosquito and tick surveillance and testing data collected by the Ohio Department of Health or collected and reported by local health districts. Information can include location and dates of trapping/surveillance, vector species identified, and testing status for pathogens.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: Summary electronic records (e.g., Excel database)- superseded. Hardcopy/paper and Electronic documents- ; Electronic: Summary electronic records (e.g., Excel database)- superseded. Hardcopy/paper and Electronic documents-
